title: General entropy_from_logits Triton dispatch
summary: Route CUDA entropy_from_logits callsites through the streaming entropy kernel, including remove-padding 2D inputs, with dispatcher coverage and benchmark data.
success_gate: Preserve entropy_from_logits semantics for CPU and low-precision outputs while beating the existing CUDA path on representative padded and remove-padding shapes.

results.note: entropy_from_logits now routes CUDA callsites through the streaming kernel for generic (..., V) inputs while preserving the legacy low-precision output dtype semantics in torch_functional.

notes: Regression checked with python -m unittest tests.test_logprob_entropy_kernel -v.
Syntax checked with python -m py_compile verl/utils/kernel/entropy_from_logits.py verl/utils/torch_functional.py scripts/benchmark_entropy_dispatch.py tests/test_entropy_from_logits_kernel.py.
